arts.ttl: Arsenal supporters serenade Declan Rice with brilliant new chant about his free-kicks as they pack bars in Madrid ahead of Champions League decider
arts.sum: Arsenal fans are taking over Madrid, packing the local bars and have even been serenading the locals with a brilliant new chant about Declan Rice. The crucial second leg takes place tonight.

arts.ttl: Mbappe available for Copa del Rey final despite one-game ban
arts.sum: Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappe will be available for the Copa del Rey final against Barcelona after receiving one-match ban for red card against Alaves.

arts.ttl: Liverpool star follows Van Dijk example and rejects Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool star follows Van Dijk example and rejects Real Madrid And Alexis Mac Allister is set to follow the example of Liverpool’s captain by rejecting the opportunity of going to the Champions League quarter-finalists.

arts.ttl: ‘Already’: Theo Walcott says he’s noticed something incredible about Ethan Nwaneri off the pitch
arts.sum: Arsenal could be set for a season to remember as they’re on the verge of making the Champions League semi-finals for the first time in...

arts.ttl: Three reasons why Arsenal should not fear another Real Madrid 'remontada'
arts.sum: Gunners should be confident they are not the latest victims of a famous Champions League comeback at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch Champions League online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Arsenal in the return leg of the Champions League Quarterfinals. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Fran Garcia, Tchouameni, Modric, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE | ‘It could be a very very tough tie for Arsenal to not completely explode’ – former Gunner makes prediction ahead of Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Former Arsenal forward Jérémie Aliadière has provided his prediction ahead of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg between Arsenal and Real Madrid in an exclusive interview with Get Football.…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid needs another comeback for the ages to advance in the Champions League
arts.sum: Only four times has a home team erased a first-leg deficit of three goals or more in the Champions League era, according to UEFA. It was in the atmospheric Bernabeu that Madrid scored goals in the 90th and 91st minutes — both by Rodrygo — to force extra time before completing an extraordinary come-from-behind win over Manchester City in the Champions League semifinals in 2022.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE | Former Arsenal forward on the Kylian Mbappé-Vinícius Jr. partnership: ‘I feel that sometimes they’re on each other’s toes, and they get in each other’s way.’
arts.sum: Former Arsenal forward Jérémie Aliadière has told Get Football in an exclusive interview that he has been unimpressed with the Kylian Mbappé-Vinícius Jr. partnership so far at Real Madrid. Aliadière…

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal make enquiry to sign 23-goal striker who's already decided to leave his club this summer
arts.sum: It’s become abundantly clear that Arsenal will attempt to sign a new striker to boost Mikel Arteta’s squad next season. By all accounts, Kai Havertz...
